name: Black Walnut Christmas Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in egg yolks all at once.
3. Add vanilla.
4. Sift dry ingredients together.
5. Set aside 1 cup of the dry ingredients.
6. Add the remaining flour mixture and milk in small portions, alternately, mixing well with each addition, starting and ending with an addition of the dry ingredients.
7. Mix together the reserved flour and nuts, and stir into the batter, mixing just until blended.
8. Beat egg whites until stiff but not dry.
9. Fold egg whites into the batter.
10. Bake in a greased and floured 9x5-inch loaf pan or 3 quart mold at 350°F for about 50-60 minutes, or until done.
11. Frost with your favorite icing.
